# Dependency Updater Ai MCP

> Dependency Updater MCP — automation tooling for dependency updater

`dependency-updater-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install dependency-updater-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx dependency-updater-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `check_outdated` — Parse a dependency manifest (requirements.txt, package.json) and identify outdated packages.
- `suggest_updates` — Suggest dependency updates with a chosen strategy: patch (safest), minor, or major (latest).
- `check_vulnerabilities` — Check a comma-separated list of 'package==version' for known vulnerabilities.
- `generate_lockfile` — Generate a deterministic lockfile-style output with pinned versions and integrity hashes.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/dependency-updater-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/dependency-updater-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
